rules.summary: Unsanitized eval usage may lead to arbitrary code execution.

useEffect dependency list is incomplete and can cause stale data bugs.

rules.line_snippet: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }
rules.summary: Sequential API calls in loop can cause major latency regressions.

rules.line_snippet: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + params.id).then(r => r.json());
